name: Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare and slice the apples in a large bowl.
2. Mix the ingredients for the filling (sugar, flour, nutmeg) and sprinkle over the apple slices.
3. Drizzle with lemon juice and toss to combine, ensuring the apples are covered completely by the juice.
4. Place the mixture into the pie shell.
5. In a small bowl, combine 1/2 cup sugar and 1/2 cup flour for the topping. Cut in the butter until crumbly.
6. Sprinkle the crumbly topping over the apples.
7. Carefully place the pie in a heavy brown paper bag large enough to cover it loosely. Fold the open end of the bag over twice and secure with paper clips.
8. Place the covered pie on a cookie sheet.
9. Bake in a preheated 425°F (220°C) oven for 1 hour, or until golden brown.
